Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiffs
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Laurie Yoon, Esq. (415.524.4303; lyoon@murchisonlaw.com) of Murchison & Cumming, LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

No parties contested the tentative ruling. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT J.J. ZHU CORPORATION's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiffs:

Defendant, J.J. Zhu Corporation's unopposed Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiffs; And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiffs shall appear for their depositions within one week of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $1,620 is GRANTED. Sanctions are payable no later than three weeks from notice of this order.

Moving party to submit proposed order to JPT by noon with copy to all parties via email at
peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

*Order is signed after hearing.*

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
